cases.question: What were BMW Group revenues in 2024?
cases.gold_answer: BMW Group revenues in 2024 were €142,380 million.

cases.question: What EBIT margin does BMW expect for the Automotive segment?
cases.gold_answer: BMW expects the Automotive segment EBIT margin to be in the range of 5% to 7% in 2025.

cases.question: What reduction target did BMW set for Scope 3 automobile emissions?
cases.gold_answer: BMW set an absolute Scope 3 automobiles target of 108 million tonnes of CO2e, a reduction of 27.5% compared with 2019.

cases.question: What does Volkswagen expect for sales revenue and operating return on sales in 2025?
cases.gold_answer: Volkswagen expects Group sales revenue in 2025 to exceed the previous year's figure by up to 5% and Group operating return on sales to be between 5.5% and 6.5%.

cases.question: What was Bosch Group free cash flow in 2024?
cases.gold_answer: Bosch Group free cash flow in 2024 was positive at 0.9 billion euros.

cases.question: What was Bosch liquidity at the end of the year in the 2024 cash flow statement?
cases.gold_answer: Bosch liquidity at the end of the year was 8,223 million euros.

cases.question: What was Mercedes-Benz free cash flow of the industrial business in 2024?
cases.gold_answer: Mercedes-Benz free cash flow of the industrial business in 2024 was €9.2 billion.

cases.question: What value does the Mercedes-Benz free cash flow of the industrial business table show for 2024?
cases.gold_answer: The Mercedes-Benz free cash flow of the industrial business table shows 9,152 million euros for 2024.

cases.question: What dividend did Siemens propose for fiscal 2024?
cases.gold_answer: Siemens proposed a dividend of €5.20 per share for fiscal 2024.

cases.question: What was Digital Industries' order backlog at the end of fiscal 2024?
cases.gold_answer: At the end of fiscal 2024, Digital Industries' order backlog amounted to €9 billion, of which €6 billion are expected to be converted into revenue in fiscal 2025.

cases.question: What was Smart Infrastructure's order backlog at the end of fiscal 2024?
cases.gold_answer: At the end of fiscal 2024, Smart Infrastructure's order backlog was €18 billion, of which €13 billion are expected to be converted into revenue in fiscal 2025.

cases.question: Compare BMW and Volkswagen outlook for 2025.
cases.gold_answer: BMW expects Automotive EBIT margin in 2025 to be 5% to 7%, while Volkswagen expects Group sales revenue to exceed the previous year by up to 5% and Group operating return on sales to be 5.5% to 6.5%.
